title: CatwarriorEN_ep01
synopsis: 深入黑暗森林，雷族正面臨困境。醫貓斑葉從星族得到預言：一隻特別的火會拯救貓族。與此同時，夢想野外狩獵的家貓小橘獨自進入森林，卻遭到野貓攻擊。

new_characters.name: CatwarriorEN_bluestar
new_characters.tags: silver fur, gray fur, blue eyes, scar, large build, cat ears, cat tail, animal ears, slit pupils, fangs

new_characters.name: CatwarriorEN_spottedleaf
new_characters.tags: tortoiseshell fur, small build, beautiful, cat ears, cat tail, animal ears, slit pupils, fangs

new_characters.name: CatwarriorEN_rusty
new_characters.tags: orange fur, ginger fur, handsome, pet cat, cat ears, cat tail, animal ears, slit pupils, fangs

new_characters.name: CatwarriorEN_smudge
new_characters.tags: black fur, white fur, plump, amber eyes, pet cat, cat ears, cat tail, animal ears, slit pupils, fangs

new_characters.name: CatwarriorEN_graypaw
new_characters.tags: fluffy fur, gray fur, wide face, yellow eyes, kitten, cat ears, cat tail, animal ears, slit pupils, fangs

new_characters.name: CatwarriorEN_lionheart
new_characters.tags: golden fur, tabby fur, huge build, green eyes, magnificent, cat ears, cat tail, animal ears, slit pupils, fangs

panels.prompt: multiple boys, multiple girls, cat ears, cat tail, animal ears, slit pupils, fangs, a group of wild cats, dark forest, worried expressions, bluestar and spottedleaf in foreground, wide shot, dramatic shadow, dense trees

dialogues.speaker: narration
dialogues.text:
在黑暗森林深處…
雷族正陷入困境。

panels.prompt: 1girl, cat ears, cat tail, animal ears, slit pupils, fangs, bluestar, worried expression, looking at spottedleaf, forest background, close-up

dialogues.speaker: CatwarriorEN_bluestar
dialogues.text: 星族… 真的會指引我們嗎？

panels.prompt: 1girl, cat ears, cat tail, animal ears, slit pupils, fangs, spottedleaf, looking at the starry sky, glowing eyes, magical light, receiving a vision, forest background, close-up

dialogues.speaker: CatwarriorEN_spottedleaf
dialogues.text: …一團烈火… 將會拯救我們！

panels.prompt: 1boy, cat ears, cat tail, animal ears, slit pupils, fangs, rusty, sitting in a cozy garden, looking towards a dark forest, sunny day, wide shot

dialogues.speaker: narration
dialogues.text: 與此同時，森林不遠處…

panels.prompt: 1boy, cat ears, cat tail, animal ears, slit pupils, fangs, rusty, dreaming expression, wistful, looking into the distance, garden background, close-up

dialogues.speaker: CatwarriorEN_rusty
dialogues.text:
雖然家裡很舒服…
但野外… 一定更有趣吧！

panels.prompt: 1boy, cat ears, cat tail, animal ears, slit pupils, fangs, rusty, dreaming of hunting, pouncing on a mouse, forest setting, thought bubble, motion blur
2boys, cat ears, cat tail, animal ears, slit pupils, fangs, smudge and rusty talking, smudge looking worried, rusty curious, garden fence, night

dialogues.speaker: CatwarriorEN_smudge
dialogues.text:
森林裡很危險的！
有很多野貓！

panels.prompt: 1boy, cat ears, cat tail, animal ears, slit pupils, fangs, smudge, frightened expression, emphasizing warning, close-up

dialogues.speaker: CatwarriorEN_smudge
dialogues.text:
那些野貓
會攻擊你！

panels.prompt: 1boy, cat ears, cat tail, animal ears, slit pupils, fangs, rusty, determined expression, looking over the fence towards the dark forest, night, close-up

dialogues.speaker: CatwarriorEN_rusty
dialogues.text:
但我很好奇…
我想去看看！

panels.prompt: 1boy, cat ears, cat tail, animal ears, slit pupils, fangs, rusty, jumping over a garden fence, silhouette, moon in the background, night, wide shot

dialogues.speaker: sfx
dialogues.text: 唰！

panels.prompt: 1boy, cat ears, cat tail, animal ears, slit pupils, fangs, rusty, cautiously entering a dark forest, alert posture, dark shadows, night, wide shot
1boy, cat ears, cat tail, animal ears, slit pupils, fangs, rusty, successfully pouncing on a mouse, proud expression, forest floor, night, close-up, speed lines

dialogues.speaker: sfx
dialogues.text: 嘶！

panels.prompt: 2boys, cat ears, cat tail, animal ears, slit pupils, fangs, graypaw lunging at rusty from behind bushes, rusty surprised, dramatic action, night forest, impact lines

dialogues.speaker: sfx
dialogues.text: 吼！

panels.prompt: 1boy, cat ears, cat tail, animal ears, slit pupils, fangs, rusty, startled expression, dodging an attack, surprised, close-up, speed lines

dialogues.speaker: CatwarriorEN_rusty
dialogues.text: 什麼？！

panels.prompt: 2boys, cat ears, cat tail, animal ears, slit pupils, fangs, rusty pinning graypaw down, fierce expression, graypaw struggling, forest floor, impact lines

dialogues.speaker: sfx
dialogues.text: 砰！

panels.prompt: 1boy, cat ears, cat tail, animal ears, slit pupils, fangs, graypaw, surprised and pinned, struggling, close-up

dialogues.speaker: CatwarriorEN_graypaw
dialogues.text: 你… 你是誰？！

panels.prompt: 1boy, cat ears, cat tail, animal ears, slit pupils, fangs, rusty, looking at graypaw, realization, surprised, close-up

dialogues.speaker: CatwarriorEN_rusty
dialogues.text: …你… 你是隻小貓？

panels.prompt: 2boys, cat ears, cat tail, animal ears, slit pupils, fangs, rusty and graypaw talking, less aggressive, forest background, wide shot

dialogues.speaker: CatwarriorEN_graypaw
dialogues.text:
我叫灰爪！
是野貓！

panels.prompt: 1boy, cat ears, cat tail, animal ears, slit pupils, fangs, rusty, curious expression, listening, close-up

dialogues.speaker: CatwarriorEN_rusty
dialogues.text:
你為什麼
攻擊我？

panels.prompt: 1boy, cat ears, cat tail, animal ears, slit pupils, fangs, graypaw, slightly embarrassed, explaining, close-up

dialogues.speaker: CatwarriorEN_graypaw
dialogues.text:
我以為…
你是入侵者！

panels.prompt: 2boys, 1girl, cat ears, cat tail, animal ears, slit pupils, fangs, bluestar and lionheart emerging from dark shadows, imposing figures, rusty and graypaw turning to look, night forest, wide shot, dramatic shadow

dialogues.speaker: sfx
dialogues.text: 沙沙…

panels.prompt: 1girl, cat ears, cat tail, animal ears, slit pupils, fangs, bluestar, serious and observing expression, looking at rusty and graypaw, close-up

dialogues.speaker: CatwarriorEN_bluestar
dialogues.text: 這裡發生了什麼事？

panels.prompt: 2boys, 1girl, cat ears, cat tail, animal ears, slit pupils, fangs, rusty looking defiant, graypaw looking wary, bluestar and lionheart in background, night forest, wide shot

dialogues.speaker: CatwarriorEN_lionheart
dialogues.text:
這隻家貓…
竟然懂得打鬥？

panels.prompt: 1boy, cat ears, cat tail, animal ears, slit pupils, fangs, lionheart, surprised expression, impressed, close-up

dialogues.speaker: CatwarriorEN_lionheart
dialogues.text:
而且…
還制服了灰爪！

panels.prompt: 1girl, cat ears, cat tail, animal ears, slit pupils, fangs, bluestar, thoughtful expression, looking intently at rusty, close-up

dialogues.speaker: CatwarriorEN_bluestar
dialogues.text:
這隻小貓…
很不尋常。

panels.prompt: 2boys, 1girl, cat ears, cat tail, animal ears, slit pupils, fangs, bluestar, lionheart, rusty, graypaw, tense atmosphere, bluestar looking directly at rusty, night forest, wide shot

dialogues.speaker: narration
dialogues.text: 家貓小橘的命運，將如何改變？
